prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次分别为11163→9354→19594→15125→15413，波动剧烈：2021至2022年前移约1809名，2023年大幅后移约10240名（出现明显 断档），2024年大幅前移约4469名，2025年基本持平于15413名；近2年位次趋于稳定，2025年基准约15413名；本省物理类计划2021年29人、2022年30人、2023 年30人、2024年27人、2025年31人，2026年计划33人，较2025年增加2人，呈小幅扩招态势，竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名近 年略有下滑（2026年第92名），但仍属全国百强，在师范类院校中位居前列；2025年高考周期内声誉评价为偏负面（师德师风事件），2026年无新增重大舆情；抖音热度排名第100位，评价为一般，短视频平台曝光度不高，对报考热度影响有限；第五轮学科评估中仅外国语言文学获评A-，物理类招生专业（物理学、电 子信息工程、化学工程与工艺等）对应的学科均未进入A类，优势学科对理科考生的吸引力相对有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信类专业2024年热度为高热推荐，电气 工程及其自动化高热推荐，计算机类推荐，这些热门工科专业可能吸引更多考生报考该校物理类；吉林省2026年物理类考生估算约7.99万人，较2025年8.04万人略降约500人，竞 争基数小幅收窄；湖南师范大学位于长沙，属中部地区，对吉林考生为跨省就读。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次15413名、2026年扩招2人使竞争略缓解、考生总数小幅下降、电子信息等热门工科专业可能 提升报考热度等因素；但扩招幅度有限且工科热度上升可能吸引更多考生，位次在基准基础上略作前移修正；预测2026年物理类最低位次约15 960名，区间15460–16460名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were 11163 → 9354 → 19594 → 15125 → 15413, with significant fluctuations: from 2021 to 2022, it moved forward by about 1809 places; in 2023, it moved backward sharply by about 10240 places (showing an obvious gap); in 2024, it moved forward significantly by about 4469 places; in 2025, it remained basically stable at 15413; rankings have stabilized in the past two years, with a baseline of about 15413 in 2025; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 29 in 2021, 30 in 2022, 30 in 2023, 27 in 2024, 31 in 2025, and 33 in 2026, an increase of 2 compared to 2025, showing a slight expansion trend, easing competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; the main ranking of Soft Science has slightly declined in recent years (92nd in 2026), but it is still among the top 100 in the country and ranks high among normal universities; during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (teacher ethics incident), with no major new public opinion in 2026; Douyin popularity ranking is 100th, rated as average, with low exposure on short video platforms, having limited impact on application enthusiasm; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, only Foreign Language and Literature was rated A-, and the majors enrolled in Physics Category (Physics, Electronic Information Engineering, Chemical Engineering and Technology, etc.) did not enter the A category, so the advantage disciplines have relatively limited appeal to science candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication majors were highly recommended in 2024, Electrical Engineering and Automation was highly recommended, and Computer Science was recommended; these popular engineering majors may attract more candidates to apply for the Physics Category of this university; the estimated number of Physics Category candidates in Jilin Province in 2026 is about 79,900, a slight decrease of about 500 from 80,400 in 2025, narrowing the competition base slightly; Hunan Normal University is located in Changsha, in the central region, which is an inter-provincial study for Jilin candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 15413, the slight easing of competition due to the expansion of 2 places in 2026, the small decrease in the total number of candidates, and the possible increase in application enthusiasm due to popular engineering majors like Electronic Information; however, the expansion is limited and the rise in engineering popularity may attract more candidates, so the ranking is slightly adjusted forward from the baseline; the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 15960, with a range of 15460–16460.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including Liberal Arts) were 1683 → 3737 → 1841 → 2531 → 2018, showing significant fluctuations overall, with a large backward shift of about 2054 places from 2021 to 2022, a notable recovery in 2023, another backward shift in 2024, and a slight forward movement to 2018 in 2025; rankings in the past three years oscillated within the 1841–2531 range, with a baseline of about 2018 in 2025; the provincial History Category enrollment plan was 36 in 2021, 35 in 2022, 35 in 2023, 38 in 2024, 34 in 2025, and 32 in 2026, a decrease of 2 compared to 2025, indicating a slight contraction and intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text:
A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; on the Soft Science main ranking, it ranked 86th in 2021 → 88th in 2022 → 87th in 2023 → 86th in 2024 → 88th in 2025 → 92nd in 2026, with a slight decline in recent years but still among the national top 100; during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, mainly involving a teacher ethics incident in the College of Liberal Arts, which may have suppressed some candidates' willingness to apply; in the 2026 cycle, the university did not appear in reputation documents, indicating no new major public opinion incidents; its Douyin popularity ranking was 100th, rated as average, with low exposure on short video platforms.
5. [Advantage Disciplines] In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Foreign Language and Literature was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university; Education, Chinese Language and Literature, Mathematics, Physics, and other disciplines did not enter the A category, with a relatively small number of overall advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Hunan Normal University is located in Changsha, Hunan Province, in the central region, which is an out-of-province choice for Jilin candidates; the university is in Jilin; the popularity of teacher/education majors in 2024 was assessed as differentiated and watchful, generally stable; law, Chinese language and literature, and other popular liberal arts majors are socially hot; the total number of Jilin Province college entrance examination registrants in 2026 is about 110,868, with an estimated History Category of about 30,900 based on recent proportions, roughly the same as the 31,100 in 2025, indicating a stable competition base.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2018, the slight contraction of 2 places in 2026 intensifying competition, the slight decline in university ranking, and the somewhat negative reputation, but given the limited contraction and stable total number of candidates, the negative reputation may cause some candidates to turn to other universities, leading to a slight backward adjustment from the baseline; the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is about 1977, with a range of 1483–2471.
